name: clock signal connected to module output port
description: Code should include a clock signal that is directly assigned to or connected with a module output port

name: clock signal passed as submodule instance port
description: Code should include a clock signal that is passed as an argument to a submodule instance's port

name: clock signal used in combinational logic expression
description: Code should include a clock signal used inside a combinational logic expression such as an assignment or conditional
